backend.changelog: Co-release with CadBridge 1.8.83 — a wedged (frozen-COM) SolidWorks at the start of Generate is now auto-recovered with a one-click restart prompt instead of a dead-end.

cadBridge.changelog: If SolidWorks is frozen (COM not responding) when you click Generate & Export, the app now detects it, asks you to save any work, and restarts SolidWorks into a clean session automatically — no more 'Cannot verify SolidWorks state' dead-end or manual Task-Manager kill. Your unsaved work is never discarded without asking.
